item.dc:creator: JamieSays

item.title: Update update update!!!!
item.description: Today was a massive first! There were stops and starts but I just walked the whole length of my hallway, moving my cane ahead of me in case I needed it. Just a refresher.... I fell 40 feet onto concrete November 2020 and broke both feet, both legs, left hip, right knee, pelvis, and lower spine along with my ribs. The X-rays are in my older videos. I was bed bound for 2.5 years and gained a LOT of weight. I started sharing my journey and recovery with everyone a few months ago and it's been mostly amazing! Thank you for letting me share my successes!
item.dc:creator: Bloodyvalentine549

item.title: I accidentally ate $30 worth of Bottom Shelf Memes and now I feel like garbage
item.description:
This is just working at Dick's Last Resort
UPDATE! https://imgur.com/gallery/YRpUVfe
@HileyNoteson Yoooooooooooooooooooooo
You're still here? Seems like you enjoy the type of memes I rip off of the discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka community.
Only 2,000 more Totally Fake Internet Points™ before I uninstall this fuck ass app. The clock is ticking. discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
This dump was brought to you by the meme addicted insomniacs from the Bottom Shelf Community where we shitpost 24/7 Join for the NSFW memes. Join for the games. We play everything...if there's a specific game you like, I guarantee you'll find a shitposting meme loving degen there to play it with you. We stream games on twitch.tv/bottomshelfvodka Join to ping @humlyhums Join to meet @crimebrulee the biggest problem in the server. Deal memes. Steal memes. discord.gg/bottomshelfvodka
item.dc:creator: BottomShelfVodka

item.title: Bestie tried her hardest
item.description:
Bestie just left and she made me go down with her and make some soup for dinner. But THE KITTENS!!! Who needs food when you have precious babies??
Sure, it looks delicious. But I’m not even hungry. But she made me make it.
I’ll eat when I need to. Right now, I need to snuggle with the babies. The soup will be there. I am having too much fun! Thank you, bestie, but I’m good. Big yawn!
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

item.description: He'll never match those UHF vibes.
item.dc:creator: Bandlith

item.title: Goodnight mama Bobbie and babies
item.description: I got to telework this afternoon while mama Bobbie was giving birth, but tomorrow is coming soon and I’ve gotta make that cheddar to pay for the babies. 0800 is gonna come TOO soon. I wish I had another couple of days to chill with the new family, but you should have SEEN my co-worker’s face today when I showed up after lunch to pick up my laptop to telework the rest of the day after being off all last week. If looks could kill I would be dead and buried in a landfill. Gotta be a serious adult again starting in 9 hours. Goodnight mama Bobbie and babies. I’ll see you in the morning.
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

NooPogodi

item.title: Here we go again, the Gestapo at San Francisco airport.
item.description:
Didn’t have this problem when Biden was in office! Trump is doing a really good job diverting attention from the Epstein files.
TSA is largely funded by a tax on every ticket. It adds $5.60 to every one-way ticket & $11.20 to roundtrips. Everyone in line right now is already paying the TSA fee, even for free reward travel. The government has previously diverted that money to the Treasury. Pay the agents.
item.dc:creator: LunaAtlas

item.title: Well now I know who’s gonna be trouble
item.description: Came back from downstairs and saw this little one far from the herd. I’m 99% sure it’s number six. But he was very calm, no screeching, just checking out the world. He could be trouble…

26 Imgur Creator Spotlight: @g8rmac made this awesome kitchen for their granddaughter. How cool is that? Nominated by: @wadatahmydamie
27 Man Tax: Tom Hardy
“There is no sincerer love than the love of food.” - George Bernard Shaw So, I made a discord server. It's a relaxed environment where you can take/donate memes to the cause, play trivia twice a week, chat about lots of topics or about nothing at all. We also have Jack Box game night and are setting up movie night! Very laid back/relaxed vibe. Come hang with us. https://discord.gg/AWFV7FT3RQ I'm also on the imgcat server for updates & fun: https://discord.gg/TpjD37jgJ9 https://ko-fi.com/mememuseumcurator Unable to work, zero income. Feel free to leave me a tip. Those that have, y'all are the bee's knees. You've honestly been my lifeline. (Apparently doesn't work in firefox). ***Tag me if you see an artist/creator you like whose work isn't getting seen as much as it should be! Or if you are an artist/creator and want me to post something of yours, DM me
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: My thirty seconds with Socks
item.description: I asked bestie to give me a kitten because I wanted to snuggle with one and she handed me number three Socks. I got a few seconds with her, she was so chill. These kittens are KILLING me, they are SO relaxed. I can’t handle it.
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

item.dc:creator: JoboveReus

item.title: College Reunion as a Trans Woman
item.description: Overcoming the nerves made the experience worth it, and I feel for all my trans girlies out there. Wild we are in a time where someone simply caring enough to just ask what name I prefer to use is so unexpected I cry recounting the experience... This week, Tumblr Asked Me UNHINGED Questions About My Body - So I'm Talking Boobs, BaconJams, and College Reunions this morning at 7:30am PST where I will be Live Chatting with you all if you join in the premiere! Or check it out at lunch, this vid is beautifully unhinged: https://youtu.be/x-kllGt3hfA
item.dc:creator: Alsoashley

item.title: Have no fear, mama is back
item.description:
Mama Bobbie finally got some wet food after a three-hour birth. There is some massive clean-up that needs to happen, but that is a tomorrow problem. I’m so glad she’s willing to leave them for a few minutes to get some much-needed nourishment. Maybe I should get some, too haha
These are some really well-adjusted kittens. Most newborns SCREAM when their mama leaves but they didn’t make a peep. I have major PTSD from the Sky birth but all my concerns have been put to rest. I am just so freaking happy and so proud of all of them. Ugh. HAPPY
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

item.title: Brendan Fraser tells a story about Harrison Ford
item.dc:creator: Huor

item.title: A well-deserved dinner
item.description: Mama Bobbie has not left her kittens’ sides since giving birth a few hours ago. I finally tempted her away with some wet food. She has earned this in a big way!!
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays

item.title: How would you react?
item.dc:creator: Freyja33

item.title: GovBrief Today #417
item.description: Donald Trump cast a mail ballot for a Florida special election while demanding Congress pass a law to make mail voting illegal. He never solves problems he can still use. Republican senators pitched him a plan Sunday night to end the five-week DHS shutdown by funding everything except ICE. Trump rejected it. No deal until Democrats pass the SAVE America Act, he said. His own party calls the voting restrictions bill unrealistic because they can't pass it. But Trump needs the airport lines. They're the only leverage he has to force through a bill that can't pass on its own. That's what he did running for president, when he killed a Republican-led border deal because he needed a border crisis. The Iran war follows the same logic. He extended his bombing deadline five days and told reporters a deal was close, that there were "major points of agreement." Iran's Foreign Ministry said there is no dialogue between Tehran and Washington. They called his claims an effort to reduce energy prices and buy time. It worked. Oil prices dropped while stock markets rallied. The war is in its fourth week. A dozen American service members are dead, along with more than 1,500 Iranians. That's the cost of keeping a problem alive because it's useful to you. We've emailed 6,700+ stories over 417 straight nights. The algorithm doesn't always show them to you. Subscribe now at govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com Today on the Website: https://go.govbrief.today/260323-full [1] https://go.govbrief.today/iran-war-260323 [2] https://go.govbrief.today/totalenergies [3] https://go.govbrief.today/trump-mail-vote [4] https://go.govbrief.today/pentagon-press-annex [5] https://go.govbrief.today/judge-nj-atty [6] https://go.govbrief.today/sfo-ice [7] https://go.govbrief.today/dhs-deal [8] https://go.govbrief.today/mullins-confirmed [9] https://go.govbrief.today/noem-expenses [10] https://go.govbrief.today/kenctr-suit Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.title: Could you imagine hearing it this way every day?
item.description: Suggest sound on.
item.dc:creator: countervail247365

item.title: Don’t squish the babies, mama!
item.description: Foster cat mama Bobbie’s heart is in the right place when she flops down to nurse her newborn kittens, but she’s TOO floppy!! This is absolutely normal for new moms so I’m not worried. They could wriggle their way out if they needed to. She’s so freaking sweet
item.dc:creator: KittensForDays
